Fidelity Quietly Launches Tokenized Treasury Fund on Ethereum
articles.description: Fidelity Asset Management has introduced a blockchain-based version of its Treasury money market fund, extending its digital finance presence. The new product, called the Fidelity Digital Interest Token (FDIT), mirrors one share of the Fidelity Treasury Digital Fund (FYOXX) and is issued directly on the Ethereum network.
